title: Abyss+
description: My personal modpack, filled with tons of different changes to make the world feel much more expanded upon.
body:
My personal modpack for Fabric. It adds various features, from biomes to animals. here's an overview:


⚔️Weapons: The mods MCDW and Amarite add tons of brand new weapons for you and your friends to mess around and battle with.

🌴Biomes: Terralith, OTBWG, BetterNether, and BetterEnd add tons of brand new biomes, items, and mobs.

🏠Structures: Moog's Voyager Structures, Moog's Nether Structures, Moog's End Structures, BetterEnd Cities, and Enchantsmith add tons of brand new structures for you to find and explore. Some also contain special decorative blocks, so you can make an epic-looking base with ease!

🪄Enchantments: The mods Enchancement and MCDW add lots of brand new enchantments to add to your weapons and armor! Try them out and have an epic combat experience against your friends!

☄️Cobblemon: This modpack even incorporates the world of Cobblemon, allowing you to catch them and battle your friends with your epic Cobblemon team! It also adds a Fight of Flight mod that makes the Cobblemon fight back if hit, making the world much more immersive.

👉And More: There's a lot of mods that I haven't listed here. Try out the modpack, and explore the greatly improved world yourself!
